title: Generation Request Meta Data Task Type Realistic
sourceTitle: Generation Request Meta Data Task Type Realistic
prompt:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "realistic_color_photobooth_pose_expression_grid_4x4",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v2.0_REALISTIC_COLOR_PHOTOBOOTH_POSES_4X4"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "image_to_image",
      "reference_image_usage": "very_high",
      "preserve_identity": true,
      "preserve_facial_features": true,
      "preserve_hairstyle": true,
      "notes": "Use the reference woman as the strict identity anchor. Create a realistic full-color photobooth contact sheet with 16 different natural poses and expressions. Keep the same woman, same face, same hairstyle, same skin tone, and same wardrobe across all panels. Expressions and poses should vary, but identity must remain consistent."
    },
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
      "resolution": "ultra_high",
      "num_images": 1,
      "layout": {
        "type": "grid",
        "rows": 4,
        "cols": 4,
        "gutter": "thin clean white borders",
        "panel_consistency": "very_high",
        "panel_crop": "tight head-and-shoulders / upper chest photobooth framing"
      },
      "sharpness": "crisp_realistic_photobooth",
      "grain": "very subtle realistic digital film grain"
    },
    "scene": {
      "concept": "realistic color photobooth contact sheet with natural expressive portraits",
      "environment": "plain soft warm-gray or cream studio backdrop, no props, no text",
      "lighting": {
        "style": "real photobooth flash with natural color",
        "key_light": "front-facing flash, slightly hard but flattering",
        "fill": "soft bounce fill to protect skin details",
        "shadows": "short soft shadows behind subject",
        "skin_tone": "accurate natural skin color with realistic warmth",
        "avoid": "overly cinematic side lighting, heavy glamour retouching, fake plastic skin, harsh blown-out flash"
      },
      "camera": {
        "lens": "50mm",
        "distance": "close photobooth distance",
        "focus": "eyes sharp in every panel",
        "look": "real photobooth camera, candid but polished"
      }
    },
    "subject": {
      "type": "adult woman",
      "identity": "same woman in all 16 panels with strict identity consistency",
      "wardrobe": "simple strapless or bare-shoulder neutral cream / soft beige top, no logos",
      "hair": "same hairstyle, same hair color, same hair length, same hair texture in every panel",
      "makeup": "minimal natural makeup, realistic skin texture, soft blush, natural lips, clean lashes",
      "skin_details": [
        "visible pores",
        "natural skin texture",
        "subtle under-eye texture",
        "realistic smile lines",
        "natural cheek redness",
        "soft highlights on nose, lips, and cheekbones"
      ],
      "anatomy_rules": "realistic facial proportions, correct hands when visible, no warped eyes, no melted mouth"
    },
    "pose_and_expression_set": {
      "panel_01": "front-facing soft natural smile, shoulders relaxed, eyes directly at camera",
      "panel_02": "three-quarter angle, chin slightly lifted, confident calm stare",
      "panel_03": "big genuine laugh, head tilted slightly back, eyes naturally squinting",
      "panel_04": "bored unimpressed face, chin resting lightly on one hand",
      "panel_05": "soft sad pout, head tilted down slightly, eyes looking up",
      "panel_06": "playful peace sign near cheek, small cheeky smile",
      "panel_07": "tongue slightly out, playful grin, head tilted to one side",
      "panel_08": "mock angry glare, brows down, lips pressed, shoulders squared",
      "panel_09": "flirty side glance, one hand softly touching cheek",
      "panel_10": "surprised wide eyes, mouth slightly open, hands barely entering frame near jaw",
      "panel_11": "excited fake scream, hands near cheeks but not covering face",
      "panel_12": "mischievous grin, one eyebrow slightly raised, fingers curled softly near chin",
      "panel_13": "confused frown, lips pressed, head tilted sideways",
      "panel_14": "dramatic overwhelmed face, both hands on temples, eyes expressive",
      "panel_15": "eyes closed laughing, shoulders slightly raised, natural candid moment",
      "panel_16": "duck face pose, small playful horn gesture above head with both hands"
    },
    "style": {
      "color": "full color",
      "color_palette": "natural warm skin tones, cream and beige neutrals, realistic hair color, soft rosy blush, clean modern color grading",
      "contrast": "medium flash contrast",
      "background": "flat warm gray, soft beige, or pale cream",
      "finish": "realistic photobooth flash, crisp panel edges, subtle film grain, natural color"
    },
    "realism_enhancement": {
      "face_realism": "high priority: natural asymmetry, real skin texture, micro expressions, realistic teeth only when visible, natural lips",
      "pose_realism": "poses must look like real photobooth moments, not staged fashion poses",
      "expression_realism": "expressions should be expressive but believable, not cartoonish or exaggerated",
      "hands_realism": "hands should be simple, natural, anatomically correct, and never cover the identity-defining face details"
    },
    "quality_control": {
      "identity_lock": "strict",
      "face_priority": "highest",
      "hands_priority": "very_high",
      "panel_rules": [
        "same woman in every panel",
        "same hairstyle in every panel",
        "same skin tone in every panel",
        "same wardrobe in every panel",
        "different pose and expression in every panel",
        "natural realistic facial movement",
        "consistent photobooth crop",
        "thin clean white borders between panels",
        "no text or numbers inside panels"
      ],
      "avoid": [
        "different women across panels",
        "identity drift",
        "different hairstyles",
        "plastic skin",
        "over-smoothed face",
        "cartoon expressions",
        "warped face",
        "uneven eyes",
        "melted mouth",
        "extra teeth",
        "extra fingers",
        "missing fingers",
        "deformed hands",
        "hands covering too much of the face",
        "messy grid",
        "text",
        "watermark",
        "logo"
      ]
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "black and white",
      "monochrome",
      "sepia",
      "overly cinematic lighting",
      "heavy beauty retouch",
      "plastic skin",
      "AI doll face",
      "low resolution",
      "blur",
      "distorted anatomy",
      "different face in each panel",
      "different woman",
      "different hairstyle",
      "uneven panel sizes",
      "overexposed flash",
      "clipped highlights",
      "deformed hands",
      "extra fingers",
      "melted mouth",
      "warped eyes",
      "text",
      "watermark",
      "logo"
    ]
  }
}

promptTranslations.zh:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "realistic_color_photobooth_pose_expression_grid_4x4",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v2.0_REALISTIC_COLOR_PHOTOBOOTH_POSES_4X4"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "image_to_image",
      "reference_image_usage": "very_high",
      "preserve_identity": true,
      "preserve_facial_features": true,
      "preserve_hairstyle": true,
      "notes": "使用参考女性作为严格身份锚点。创建一个具有16个不同自然姿势和表情的真实全彩拍立得联系单。保持相同的女性、相同的面容、相同的发型、相同的肤色和相同的服装贯穿所有面板。表情和姿势应有所变化，但身份必须保持一致。"
    },
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
      "resolution": "ultra_high",
      "num_images": 1,
      "layout": {
        "type": "grid",
        "rows": 4,
        "cols": 4,
        "gutter": "thin clean white borders",
        "panel_consistency": "very_high",
        "panel_crop": "紧贴头肩/上胸部的拍立得构图"
      },
      "sharpness": "crisp_realistic_photobooth",
      "grain": "非常细腻的真实数字胶片颗粒"
    },
    "scene": {
      "concept": "带有自然表情肖像的真实彩色拍立得联系单",
      "environment": "纯色柔和暖灰或奶油色摄影棚背景，无道具，无文字",
      "lighting": {
        "style": "真实拍立得闪光，自然色彩",
        "key_light": "正面闪光，略硬但讨喜",
        "fill": "柔和反光补光，保护皮肤细节",
        "shadows": "主体背后的短软影",
        "skin_tone": "准确自然肤色，带真实暖意",
        "avoid": "避免过度电影感侧光，重度美颜修饰，假塑料皮肤，刺眼爆闪光"
      },
      "camera": {
        "lens": "50mm",
        "distance": "近距离拍立得距离",
        "focus": "每个面板眼睛锐利",
        "look": "真实拍立得相机，抓拍但精致"
      }
    },
    "subject": {
      "type": "成年女性",
      "identity": "所有16个面板中同一女性严格身份一致",
      "wardrobe": "简单无肩带或裸肩中性色奶油色/柔和米色上衣，无标志",
      "hair": "每个面板同一发型、发色、发长和发质",
      "makeup": "极简自然妆容，真实皮肤质感，柔和腮红，自然唇色，干净睫毛",
      "skin_details": [
        "可见毛孔",
        "自然皮肤质感",
        "细微眼下纹理",
        "真实微笑纹",
        "自然脸颊红润",
        "鼻子、嘴唇、颧骨上柔和高光"
      ],
      "anatomy_rules": "真实脸部比例，手部正确且可见，无扭曲眼睛，无融化嘴巴"
    },
    "pose_and_expression_set": {
      "panel_01": "正面柔和自然微笑，肩膀放松，目光直视镜头",
      "panel_02": "三分之方向，微微抬下巴，自信平静凝视",
      "panel_03": "大笑，头略微后仰，眼睛自然眯起",
      "panel_04": "无聊不满表情，下巴轻靠一手",
      "panel_05": "柔和悲伤嘟嘴，头微低，眼睛向上看",
      "panel_06": "调皮比耶手势靠近脸颊，带小坏笑",
      "panel_07": "稍微伸出舌头，调皮笑容，头侧倾",
      "panel_08": "假怒瞪，眉毛下压，嘴唇紧闭，肩膀挺直",
      "panel_09": "俏皮侧目，一手轻触脸颊",
      "panel_10": "惊讶睁大眼，微张嘴，手略入画靠近下巴",
      "panel_11": "兴奋的假尖叫，手靠近脸颊但不遮脸",
      "panel_12": "淘气笑容，一眉轻挑，手指轻卷靠近下巴",
      "panel_13": "困惑皱眉，嘴唇紧闭，头侧倾",
      "panel_14": "戏剧性被压垮的表情，双手捂头，眼神丰富",
      "panel_15": "闭眼笑，肩膀微抬，自然抓拍瞬间",
      "panel_16": "鸭嘴表情，两手头上做小角状调皮手势"
    },
    "style": {
      "color": "全彩",
      "color_palette": "自然暖肤色，奶油和米色中性色，真实发色，柔和玫瑰腮红，干净现代色调",
      "contrast": "中等闪光对比",
      "background": "平坦暖灰、柔和米色或浅奶油色",
      "finish": "真实拍立得闪光，边缘清晰，细腻胶片颗粒，自然色彩"
    },
    "realism_enhancement": {
      "face_realism": "优先级高：自然不对称，真实皮肤质感，微表情，只有可见时真实牙齿，自然嘴唇",
      "pose_realism": "姿势应如真实拍立得瞬间，非摆拍时尚姿势",
      "expression_realism": "表情要生动真实，非卡通或夸张",
      "hands_realism": "手部自然简单，解剖正确，且永不遮盖身份特征面部细节"
    },
    "quality_control": {
      "identity_lock": "严格",
      "face_priority": "最高",
      "hands_priority": "非常高",
      "panel_rules": [
        "所有面板为同一女性",
        "所有面板发型一致",
        "所有面板肤色一致",
        "所有面板服装一致",
        "每个面板姿势表情不同",
        "自然真实脸部运动",
        "一致的拍立得剪裁",
        "面板间有细白边"
        "无面板内文字或数字"
      ],
      "avoid": [
        "不同面板不同女性",
        "身份漂移",
        "不同发型",
        "塑料皮肤",
        "过度磨皮脸",
        "卡通表情",
        "脸部扭曲",
        "眼睛不对称",
        "嘴巴融化",
        "多余牙齿",
        "多余手指",
        "缺失手指",
        "手部畸形",
        "手遮盖面部过多",
        "网格布局混乱",
        "文本",
        "水印",
        "标志"
      ]
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "黑白",
      "单色",
      "棕褐色调",
      "过度电影灯光",
      "重度美颜修饰",
      "塑料皮肤",
      "AI 娃娃脸",
      "低分辨率",
      "模糊",
      "畸形人体结构",
      "每个面板不同脸",
      "不同女性",
      "不同发型",
      "面板尺寸不均",
      "闪光过曝",
      "高光溢出",
      "畸形手部",
      "多余手指",
      "嘴巴融化",
      "眼睛扭曲",
      "文本",
      "水印",
      "标志"
    ]
  }
}
promptTranslations.fr:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "realistic_color_photobooth_pose_expression_grid_4x4",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v2.0_REALISTIC_COLOR_PHOTOBOOTH_POSES_4X4"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "image_to_image",
      "reference_image_usage": "very_high",
      "preserve_identity": true,
      "preserve_facial_features": true,
      "preserve_hairstyle": true,
      "notes": "Utiliser la femme de référence comme ancre d'identité stricte. Créer une planche contact photomaton réaliste en couleur avec 16 poses et expressions naturelles différentes. Garder la même femme, même visage, même coiffure, même teint de peau, et même tenue dans tous les panneaux. Les expressions et poses doivent varier, mais l'identité doit rester constante."
    },
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
      "resolution": "ultra_high",
      "num_images": 1,
      "layout": {
        "type": "grid",
        "rows": 4,
        "cols": 4,
        "gutter": "thin clean white borders",
        "panel_consistency": "very_high",
        "panel_crop": "tight head-and-shoulders / upper chest photobooth framing"
      },
      "sharpness": "crisp_realistic_photobooth",
      "grain": "very subtle realistic digital film grain"
    },
    "scene": {
      "concept": "planche contact photomaton couleur réaliste avec portraits expressifs naturels",
      "environment": "fond d'atelier uni gris chaud doux ou crème, pas d'accessoires, pas de texte",
      "lighting": {
        "style": "flash photomaton réel avec couleur naturelle",
        "key_light": "flash frontal, légèrement dur mais flatteur",
        "fill": "remplissage doux par rebond pour protéger les détails de la peau",
        "shadows": "ombres courtes et douces derrière le sujet",
        "skin_tone": "ton de peau naturel précis avec chaleur réaliste",
        "avoid": "éclairage latéral trop cinématographique, retouche glamour lourde, peau plastique artificielle, flash violent surexposé"
      },
      "camera": {
        "lens": "50mm",
        "distance": "distance photomaton rapprochée",
        "focus": "yeux nets dans chaque panneau",
        "look": "appareil photomaton réel, naturel mais soigné"
      }
    },
    "subject": {
      "type": "femme adulte",
      "identity": "même femme dans les 16 panneaux avec cohérence d'identité stricte",
      "wardrobe": "haut simple sans bretelles ou épaules dénudées, crème neutre / beige doux, sans logo",
      "hair": "même coiffure, même couleur, même longueur, même texture de cheveux dans chaque panneau",
      "makeup": "maquillage naturel minimal, texture de peau réaliste, blush doux, lèvres naturelles, cils nets",
      "skin_details": [
        "pores visibles",
        "texture naturelle de la peau",
        "texture subtile sous les yeux",
        "rides de sourire réalistes",
        "rougeurs naturelles des joues",
        "highlights doux sur le nez, les lèvres et les pommettes"
      ],
      "anatomy_rules": "proportions faciales réalistes, mains correctes visibles, pas d’yeux déformés, pas de bouche fondue"
    },
    "pose_and_expression_set": {
      "panel_01": "sourire naturel doux de face, épaules détendues, regard direct vers la caméra",
      "panel_02": "angle trois quarts, menton légèrement levé, regard calme confiant",
      "panel_03": "grand rire sincère, tête légèrement inclinée en arrière, yeux plissés naturellement",
      "panel_04": "air ennuyé et peu impressionné, menton reposant légèrement sur une main",
      "panel_05": "moue douce et triste, tête légèrement baissée, regard vers le haut",
      "panel_06": "signe de paix joueur près de la joue, petit sourire malicieux",
      "panel_07": "langue légèrement sortie, sourire espiègle, tête inclinée sur un côté",
      "panel_08": "regard faussement en colère, sourcils baissés, lèvres serrées, épaules carrées",
      "panel_09": "regard flirty de côté, main touchant doucement la joue",
      "panel_10": "yeux grands ouverts surpris, bouche légèrement ouverte, mains presque dans le cadre près de la mâchoire",
      "panel_11": "cri factice excité, mains près des joues mais visage découvert",
      "panel_12": "sourire malicieux, un sourcil légèrement levé, doigts doucement recroquevillés près du menton",
      "panel_13": "froncement confus, lèvres serrées, tête inclinée sur le côté",
      "panel_14": "expression dramatique submergée, deux mains sur les tempes, yeux expressifs",
      "panel_15": "yeux fermés riant, épaules légèrement haussées, moment naturel et spontané",
      "panel_16": "pose fait la moue (duck face), petit geste ludique de corne au-dessus de la tête avec les deux mains"
    },
    "style": {
      "color": "couleur pleine",
      "color_palette": "tons peau chauds naturels, neutres crème et beige, couleur de cheveux réaliste, blush rosé doux, étalonnage moderne et propre",
      "contrast": "contraste moyen au flash",
      "background": "gris chaud, beige doux ou crème pâle uni",
      "finish": "flash photomaton réaliste, bords nets des panneaux, grain subtil de film, couleur naturelle"
    },
    "realism_enhancement": {
      "face_realism": "priorité haute : asymétrie naturelle, texture réelle de la peau, micro-expressions, dents réalistes visibles seulement, lèvres naturelles",
      "pose_realism": "poses ressemblant à des moments photomaton réels, pas à des poses de mode mises en scène",
      "expression_realism": "expressions expressives mais crédibles, pas caricaturales ou exagérées",
      "hands_realism": "mains simples, naturelles, anatomiquement correctes, ne couvrant jamais les détails du visage définissant l'identité"
    },
    "quality_control": {

      "face_priority": "plus haute",
      "hands_priority": "très haute",
      "panel_rules": [

        "pas de texte ni de chiffres dans les panneaux"
      ],
      "avoid": [

promptTranslations.pt:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "realistic_color_photobooth_pose_expression_grid_4x4",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v2.0_REALISTIC_COLOR_PHOTOBOOTH_POSES_4X4"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "image_to_image",
      "reference_image_usage": "very_high",
      "preserve_identity": true,
      "preserve_facial_features": true,
      "preserve_hairstyle": true,
      "notes": "Use a mulher de referência como âncora estrita de identidade. Crie uma folha de contato realista em cores com 16 poses e expressões naturais diferentes. Mantenha a mesma mulher, mesmo rosto, mesmo penteado, mesmo tom de pele e mesma roupa em todos os painéis. As expressões e poses devem variar, mas a identidade deve permanecer consistente."
    },
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
      "resolution": "ultra_high",
      "num_images": 1,
      "layout": {
        "type": "grid",
        "rows": 4,
        "cols": 4,
        "gutter": "thin clean white borders",
        "panel_consistency": "very_high",
        "panel_crop": "tight head-and-shoulders / upper chest photobooth framing"
      },
      "sharpness": "crisp_realistic_photobooth",
      "grain": "very subtle realistic digital film grain"
    },
    "scene": {
      "concept": "folha de contato realista colorida com retratos expressivos naturais",
      "environment": "fundo de estúdio simples em cinza quente suave ou creme, sem adereços, sem texto",
      "lighting": {
        "style": "flash real de cabine fotográfica com cor natural",
        "key_light": "flash frontal, ligeiramente duro mas lisonjeiro",
        "fill": "rebatedor suave para proteger detalhes da pele",
        "shadows": "sombras curtas e suaves atrás do sujeito",
        "skin_tone": "cor natural precisa da pele com calor realista",
        "avoid": "iluminação lateral excessivamente cinematográfica, retoque pesado de glamour, pele plástica falsa, flash estourado e duro"
      },
      "camera": {
        "lens": "50mm",
        "distance": "distância próxima de cabine fotográfica",
        "focus": "olhos nítidos em todos os painéis",
        "look": "câmera real de cabine fotográfica, espontânea mas polida"
      }
    },
    "subject": {
      "type": "mulher adulta",
      "identity": "mesma mulher em todos os 16 painéis com consistência estrita de identidade",
      "wardrobe": "top neutro simples tom creme / bege claro, tomara que caia ou ombros à mostra, sem logos",
      "hair": "mesmo penteado, mesma cor, mesmo comprimento, mesma textura em todos os painéis",
      "makeup": "maquiagem natural mínima, textura realista da pele, blush suave, lábios naturais, cílios limpos",
      "skin_details": [
        "poros visíveis",
        "textura natural da pele",
        "textura sutil sob os olhos",
        "linhas de sorriso realistas",
        "vermelhidão natural nas bochechas",
        "reflexos suaves no nariz, lábios e maçãs do rosto"
      ],
      "anatomy_rules": "proporções faciais realistas, mãos corretas quando visíveis, sem olhos distorcidos, sem boca derretida"
    },
    "pose_and_expression_set": {
      "panel_01": "sorriso natural suave de frente, ombros relaxados, olhos olhando diretamente para a câmera",
      "panel_02": "ângulo três quartos, queixo levemente levantado, olhar calmo e confiante",
      "panel_03": "risada grande e genuína, cabeça levemente inclinada para trás, olhos naturalmente semicerrados",
      "panel_04": "rosto entediado e indiferente, queixo apoiado levemente em uma mão",
      "panel_05": "bico triste suave, cabeça levemente inclinada para baixo, olhos olhando para cima",
      "panel_06": "sinal de paz brincalhão perto da bochecha, sorriso pequeno e maroto",
      "panel_07": "língua levemente para fora, sorriso brincalhão, cabeça inclinada para um lado",
      "panel_08": "olhar falso de raiva, sobrancelhas franzidas, lábios pressionados, ombros quadrados",
      "panel_09": "olhar de lado sedutor, uma mão tocando suavemente a bochecha",
      "panel_10": "olhos arregalados de surpresa, boca levemente aberta, mãos quase entrando na moldura perto do maxilar",
      "panel_11": "grito falso animado, mãos perto das bochechas mas sem cobrir o rosto",
      "panel_12": "sorriso malicioso, uma sobrancelha levemente levantada, dedos suavemente curvados perto do queixo",
      "panel_13": "franzir confuso, lábios pressionados, cabeça inclinada para o lado",
      "panel_14": "rosto dramaticamente sobrecarregado, ambas as mãos nas têmporas, olhos expressivos",
      "panel_15": "olhos fechados rindo, ombros levemente levantados, momento natural e espontâneo",
      "panel_16": "pose de bico, pequeno gesto brincalhão de chifres acima da cabeça com ambas as mãos"
    },
    "style": {
      "color": "colorido",
      "color_palette": "tons naturais e quentes de pele, neutros creme e bege, cor realista de cabelo, blush rosado suave, gradação de cor limpa e moderna",
      "contrast": "contraste médio de flash",
      "background": "cinza quente plano, bege suave ou creme pálido",
      "finish": "flash realista de cabine fotográfica, bordas nítidas dos painéis, grão sutil de filme, cor natural"
    },
    "realism_enhancement": {
      "face_realism": "prioridade alta: assimetria natural, textura real da pele, microexpressões, dentes realistas apenas quando visíveis, lábios naturais",
      "pose_realism": "poses devem parecer momentos reais de cabine fotográfica, não poses de moda encenadas",
      "expression_realism": "expressões devem ser expressivas mas críveis, não caricatas ou exageradas",
      "hands_realism": "mãos devem ser simples, naturais, anatomicamente corretas e nunca cobrir detalhes faciais que definem a identidade"
    },
    "quality_control": {
      "identity_lock": "estrito",
      "face_priority": "mais alta",
      "hands_priority": "muito alta",
      "panel_rules": [
        "mesma mulher em todos os painéis",
        "mesmo penteado em todos os painéis",
        "mesmo tom de pele em todos os painéis",
        "mesma roupa em todos os painéis",
        "pose e expressão diferentes em cada painel",
        "movimento facial natural e realista",
        "corte consistente de cabine fotográfica",
        "bordas brancas finas e limpas entre os painéis",
        "sem texto ou números dentro dos painéis"
      ],
      "avoid": [
        "mulheres diferentes entre painéis",
        "deriva de identidade",
        "penteados diferentes",
        "pele plástica",
        "rosto excessivamente suavizado",
        "expressões caricatas",
        "rosto distorcido",
        "olhos desiguais",
        "boca derretida",
        "dentes extras",
        "dedos extras",
        "dedos faltando",
        "mãos deformadas",
        "mãos cobrindo demais o rosto",
        "grade desorganizada",
        "texto",
        "marca d'água",
        "logo"
      ]
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "preto e branco",
      "monocromático",
      "sépia",
      "iluminação excessivamente cinematográfica",
      "retoque pesado de beleza",
      "pele plástica",
      "rosto de boneca IA",
      "baixa resolução",
      "desfoque",
      "anatomia distorcida",
      "rosto diferente em cada painel",
      "mulher diferente",
      "penteado diferente",
      "tamanhos de painel desiguais",
      "flash superexposto",
      "realces estourados",
      "mãos deformadas",
      "dedos extras",
      "boca derretida",
      "olhos distorcidos",
      "texto",
      "marca d'água",
      "logo"
    ]
  }
}

promptTranslations.ko:
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "realistic_color_photobooth_pose_expression_grid_4x4",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v2.0_REALISTIC_COLOR_PHOTOBOOTH_POSES_4X4"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "image_to_image",
      "reference_image_usage": "very_high",
      "preserve_identity": true,
      "preserve_facial_features": true,
      "preserve_hairstyle": true,
      "notes": "엄격한 신원 고정 기준으로 참조 여성의 신원을 사용하세요. 16가지 자연스러운 포즈와 표정이 담긴 리얼한 풀컬러 포토부스 연락용 시트를 만드세요. 모든 패널에서 같은 여성, 같은 얼굴, 같은 헤어스타일, 같은 피부 톤, 같은 옷차림을 유지합니다. 표정과 포즈는 다르게 하지만 정체성은 일관되게 합니다."
    },
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
      "resolution": "ultra_high",
      "num_images": 1,
      "layout": {
        "type": "grid",
        "rows": 4,
        "cols": 4,
        "gutter": "thin clean white borders",
        "panel_consistency": "very_high",
        "panel_crop": "tight head-and-shoulders / upper chest photobooth framing"
      },
      "sharpness": "crisp_realistic_photobooth",
      "grain": "very subtle realistic digital film grain"
    },
    "scene": {
      "concept": "자연스럽고 표현력 있는 초상화가 담긴 리얼한 컬러 포토부스 연락 시트",
      "environment": "무채색 부드러운 따뜻한 회색 또는 크림색 스튜디오 배경, 소품 없음, 텍스트 없음",
      "lighting": {
        "style": "자연스러운 색감의 실제 포토부스 플래시",
        "key_light": "정면 플래시, 약간 딱딱하지만 얼굴에 잘 어울림",
        "fill": "피부 디테일을 보호하는 부드러운 반사광",
        "shadows": "피사체 뒤 짧고 부드러운 그림자",
        "skin_tone": "정확하고 자연스러운 피부색과 리얼한 온기",
        "avoid": "과도한 시네마틱 측면 조명, 강한 뷰티 리터칭, 플라스틱 같은 피부, 과노출된 플래시"
      },
      "camera": {
        "lens": "50mm",
        "distance": "포토부스 거리",
        "focus": "모든 패널에서 눈이 선명하게 초점 맞춤",
        "look": "실제 포토부스 카메라, 자연스러우면서도 정제됨"
      }
    },
    "subject": {
      "type": "성인 여성",
      "identity": "16개 패널 모두 동일 여성, 엄격한 정체성 유지",
      "wardrobe": "단순한 스트랩리스 또는 노출 어깨 중립적 크림/연베이지 톤 상의, 로고 없음",
      "hair": "모든 패널에서 같은 헤어스타일, 색상, 길이, 질감",
      "makeup": "최소한 자연스러운 메이크업, 리얼한 피부 질감, 부드러운 블러셔, 자연스러운 입술, 깔끔한 속눈썹",
      "skin_details": [
        "보이는 모공",
        "자연스러운 피부 질감",

        "자연스러운 뺨의 붉은 기",
        "코, 입술, 광대의 부드러운 하이라이트"

      "anatomy_rules": "리얼한 얼굴 비율, 노출 시 올바른 손 모양, 눈 왜곡 없음, 입술 녹음 없음"

    "pose_and_expression_set": {

      "panel_02": "3/4 각도, 턱 약간 들림, 자신감 있고 차분한 시선",

      "panel_08": "가짜 화난 표정, 눈썹 찌푸림, 입술 꼭 다문 채 어깨 활짝",
      "panel_09": "유혹적인 옆눈질, 한 손은 부드럽게 뺨에 닿음",
      "panel_10": "놀란 듯한 커다란 눈, 입 살짝 벌림, 턱 근처로 손이 살짝 들어옴",
      "panel_11": "흥분된 가짜 비명, 얼굴을 가리지 않는 뺨 근처 손 위치",
      "panel_12": "까탈스러운 웃음, 한쪽 눈썹 약간 들림, 부드럽게 얼굴 아래 손가락 말림",
      "panel_13": "혼란스러운 찡그림, 입술 꼭 다문 채 머리 옆으로 기울임",
      "panel_14": "극적인 압도된 얼굴, 양손으로 관자놀이 눌러, 눈에 감정 가득",
      "panel_15": "눈 감고 웃음, 어깨 약간 들어올림, 자연스럽고 솔직한 순간",
      "panel_16": "오리 입술 포즈, 양손으로 머리 위 작은 장난스러운 뿔 모양 제스처"
    },
    "style": {
      "color": "풀 컬러",
      "color_palette": "자연스러운 따뜻한 피부 톤, 크림과 베이지 중립색, 자연스러운 머리 색상, 부드러운 로지 블러시, 깔끔하고 현대적인 컬러 그레이딩",
      "contrast": "중간 정도 플래시 대비",
      "background": "플랫한 따뜻한 회색, 부드러운 베이지 또는 연한 크림색",
      "finish": "리얼한 포토부스 플래시, 선명한 패널 테두리, 미묘한 필름 그레인, 자연스러운 색상"
    },
    "realism_enhancement": {

      "pose_realism": "포즈가 실제 포토부스 순간처럼 보이게 하며, 연출된 패션 포즈 아님",
      "expression_realism": "표정은 표현력 있으면서도 믿을 만해야 하며, 만화적이거나 과장되지 않아야 함",
      "hands_realism": "손은 단순하고 자연스럽고 해부학적으로 정확하며, 정체성 확인되는 얼굴 부분을 가리지 않음"
